title: FLOW-EDGE-BUNDLING-MODULES is not rendering anything
description: Data file flow-module-deps.json was not registered in samples/index.ts DATA_MAP. The source: file datasource resolved to empty because the viewer had no mapping for the data name.
resolution: Added flow-module-deps import and DATA_MAP entry in samples/index.ts. Edge-bundling variant renders radial hierarchical bundled links from the module dependency data.
